Figure 3: The validation curves of URS trained w/o ACVRPBTW (denoted as URS-Original) and w. ACVRPBTW (denoted as URS-Extended).

Figure 2: Overview of our SPACE framework, illustrated on the (A)CVRPBTW instances. By leveraging a unified bidirectional Fréchet representation coupled with a weight-decomposed adaptive decoding mechanism, SPACE achieves robust cross-problem zero-shot generalization across both symmetric and asymmetric VRPs, particularly remarkable in asymmetric scenarios.
